ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick the player was drafted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 100-95) */,
  "overtime" TEXT /* Overtime status (e.g., OT1, OT2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff series */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the series */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series (e.g., First Round, Finals) */,
  "series_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the series */,
  "games_won_team1" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the first team */,
  "games_won_team2" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the second team */,
  "best_of" INTEGER /* Best of how many games (e.g., 4, 7) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_series_winner FOREIGN KEY ("series_winner") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (player or team) */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., Player, Team) */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
